diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential steps from goal setting to implementation and monitoring
diagrams.purpose: Helps visualize the iterative nature of capacity planning and understand each phase's role

diagrams.title: Capacity vs Demand Over Time
diagrams.description: Line graph showing capacity threshold and growing demand curve with gap analysis
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates when capacity interventions are needed and helps identify planning horizons

diagrams.title: Workload Categories Pie Chart
diagrams.description: Distribution of different workload types based on resource consumption
diagrams.purpose: Shows diversity of workloads and importance of characterizing each type for accurate planning

diagrams.title: SLA-Capacity-Utilization Relationship
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how SLA requirements drive capacity goals which determine acceptable utilization
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies the hierarchy from business requirements to technical capacity decisions
